pi_items.source: setup_openproject.sh creates 'Mobile Banking App' with identifier 'mobile-banking-app', and setup_task.sh queries this identifier.

pi_items.metadata_value: Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline
pi_items.verified_value: Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline
pi_items.source: The task description explicitly requests this title to be used for the news announcement.

pi_items.metadata_value: All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.
pi_items.verified_value: All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.
pi_items.source: The task description explicitly requests this summary to be used for the news announcement.
The task description explicitly requires the description to include points about multi-factor authentication, security awareness training, and penetration testing.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data in a local OpenProject instance. The project identifier is 'mobile-banking-app'. The agent is explicitly instructed to create a news announcement with the title 'Mandatory Security Compliance Update - Q4 Deadline', the summary 'All team members must complete security training and update authentication modules before the Q4 compliance deadline.', and a description that includes references to multi-factor authentication, security awareness training, and penetration testing. All these values are hardcoded in the task setup scripts and task description.
